steps.title: Identify roots from the factored form
Use the given point to set up an equation in t
steps.content: Since the graph passes through $(26,0)$ and $-14\ne 26$, the other zero must be $26$, so $t=26$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $364$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $364$ is the value to enter.
